summary: Main Flow body contact slot node 1009 references character_b_body_mask.png, but the file remains zero-valued.
why_not_fixed: Lane 2 found same-scene fallback masks for breast_contact_mask.png and character_b_hand_mask.png, but did not find a trustworthy same-scene actor body segmentation source for character_b_body_mask.png. Copying an unrelated or fabricated body mask would create false spatial evidence.
next_action: Lane 1 should choose actor-hand-only graph semantics for this preset, making node 1009 optional or disabled, or provide/request an actor body segmentation source so Lane 2 can materialize a valid nonzero mask.
